channel.title: GIBSON — Transfers & Results
channel.description: Latest NIFL Premiership transfer news and results, tracked by GIBSON.

item.title: Larne 0–4 L — Red Star Belgrade
item.description: UCL Q2 · 1st leg · Inver Park

item.title: Conrad Hunt joins Coleraine
item.description: Right-back arrives at Coleraine on loan from Watford — Championship pedigree for the Bannsiders' European campaign.

item.title: Caoimhin McConnell joins Ballymena United
item.description: Attacking midfielder joins Ballymena United on a free from the Bryant Bulldogs — the rebuild rolls on at the Showgrounds.

item.title: Dean McMaster joins Cliftonville
item.description: Defensive midfielder joins Cliftonville on a free from Airdrieonians.

item.title: Alex Bannon joins Cliftonville
item.description: Centre-back arrives at Solitude on a free from Burton Albion — the Reds double up on new recruits in one window.

item.title: Callum McCay: Cliftonville → Moyola Park
item.description: Defensive midfielder leaves Cliftonville for Moyola Park on a free.

item.title: Ethan Boyle: Carrick Rangers → CK United
item.description: Right-back departs Carrick Rangers for CK United on a free.

item.title: James Knowles: Dungannon Swifts → Retired
item.description: Central midfielder hangs up the boots after leaving Dungannon Swifts.

item.title: Linfield 2–2 D — Nõmme Kalju (h)
item.description: UECL Q1 · 2nd leg · 2–3 agg · eliminated

item.title: Glentoran 2–0 L — RFS (a)
item.description: UECL Q1 · 2nd leg · 1–4 agg · eliminated

item.title: Larne 2–1 W — Tre Fiori (h)
item.description: UCL Q1 · 2nd leg · 3–1 agg

item.title: Alfie Gaston joins Limavady United
item.description: Back to where he won it: Gaston returns to Limavady on a season loan after playing a key part in their Championship title. Smart move all round — the newly promoted side get a player who knows the club, Coleraine get him first-team minutes.

item.title: Zeno Ibsen Rossi & Rhys Walsh joins Glentoran
item.description: The Glens' new arrivals confirmed on Transfermarkt — and Ibsen Rossi wasted no time, heading the opener against RFS in his first European start. Walsh arrives from Sunderland.

item.title: Owen Mahoney joins Ballymena United
item.description: Ballymena's rebuild continues — the midfielder becomes signing number nine, this time raiding the champions.

item.title: Jamie McGonigle: Coleraine → Sligo Rovers (loan)
item.description: Correction to earlier window news: McGonigle heads OUT on loan to Sligo — with Coleraine's front line already stacked after the summer's triple swoop.

item.title: Glentoran 1–2 L — RFS (h) — Ibsen Rossi 38'
item.description: UECL Q1 · 1st leg

item.title: Linfield 0–1 L — Nõmme Kalju (a)
item.description: UECL Q1 · 1st leg

item.title: Larne 0–1 W — Tre Fiori (a) — Lusty 45'
item.description: UCL Q1 · 1st leg

item.title: Kevin O'Hara joins Larne
item.description: CONFIRMED. 38 goals in 130 for Hamilton, plus 11 assists last season. Turned down a new deal and Scottish Championship interest — in the squad for Tuesday's Tre Fiori tie, pending international clearance.

item.title: Rumour: Sam Taylor to Linfield
item.description: Winger's Linfield loan from Tranmere ends as Tranmere release him — the Blues are favourites to make the move permanent.
